text.tspan: Systems to monitor the spread of antimicrobial resistance in humans,
The type of system to monitor the prevalence of antimicrobial resistance (AMR) in common bacterial infections.

g.text: Collection of data from some localities
National AMR surveillance system linked with antibiotic usage data

text.tspan: Data source: FAO, UNEP, WHO and WOAH (2024)
